nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool for tedious tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to human creativity
nodes.grounding_span: I will use it to edit things that I've written or help find a suitable color palette

nodes.label: Preserving human creative agency
nodes.grounding_span: I'm definitely driving the creative decisions

nodes.label: AI's impact on perceived authenticity of art
nodes.grounding_span: Even when humans create really beautiful things people will think it's AI

nodes.label: Creative autonomy and personal expression
nodes.grounding_span: MY art and MY creative process are still the same

nodes.label: Authenticity and human touch in art
nodes.grounding_span: I hate that humanity could be taken out of art

nodes.label: Positive appreciation for AI as a helper
nodes.grounding_span: it has been really helpful for some tasks

nodes.label: Concern about AI diminishing human creativity
nodes.grounding_span: I'm worried about AI taking humanity from the arts

nodes.label: Resistance to expanding AI use
nodes.grounding_span: Hopefully not at all. I feel like I've already included AI as much as I'd like to

nodes.label: Intentional boundary-setting — minimal AI integration
nodes.grounding_span: I try to use AI as little as possible

nodes.label: Process-driven creative autonomy — AI only for prep
nodes.grounding_span: the AI just helped me streamline the process so I could get to the fun part quicker
